mapper.select: select id, request_id, business_type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from idempotency where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select 1 from idempotency where request_id = #{requestId} and business_type = #{businessType}
mapper.insert: insert into idempotency(id,request_id, business_type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{requestId}, #{businessType}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into idempotency(id,request_id, business_type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.requestId}, #{entity.businessType}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into idempotency(id,request_id, business_type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.requestId}, #{entity.businessType}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update request_id = values(request_id), business_type = values(business_type), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
